raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee Leel·Kungi
dsirdehs / ka es ar tewim etmu
runnajs / un pee tewim nahk /
uhs tewi fakka : Stahsti
mums jelle / ko effi tu ar to
Kehnizu runnajs/ ne apttep to
preefsch mums/ tad ne gribbam
mehe tewi nokaut/ un ko irr tas
Kehnisch us tewin runnajs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew us teem
fazziht: Es patrittu luhgdamg
preefsch ta Kehnixa/ ka taſ man-
ni ne liktu Jonatana Namma
west/ tur nomirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiſfi Leel·Kungi
pee Jeremijus nahze/ un winnu
waizaja/ tad stahstija wiſch teem
pehz wiſteem ſcheem Wahrdeem/
ko tas Kehnisch bij pawehlejs.
Un tee atftahje no winna/ jo ta
Leeta ne tappe dsirdeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus palikke Zec-
tuma Pagalmā lihds tai Deenat/
kad Jerusaleme tappe uhsjeunta/
un wiſch bija wehl (tur/) kad
Jerusaleme jaw bija uhsneinta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXXIX. Nodalla.
Jerusaleme tohp weenpadesmitā Gaddā Zede-
fijus uhsjeunta: 1. Kas eekſch Behgschanag
fajemts: 4/ 5. Apſtulbohts/ un ar Schkeh-
dehtm faistihts/ uhs Babeli weks tohp: 7.
Lihds ar teem Randim: 9. Bes ween Je-
remijus/ un EbedMeleks tohp faudsehts:
11/ 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ewitā Gaddā Zedeſti-
jus ta Kehnixa no Juḥ-
da/ definitā Mehneſti /
nahze NebukadRezars tas Keh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "nitsch no Babeles/ un wiſe win-
na Kerra·Spehks prett Jerusa-
leini/ un apmettehs ap winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weenpadesmitā Gaddā
Zedeſtius/ zettortā Mehneſti/ de-
witā Deenā tahs Mehnes/ eelau-
sahs tee Pilsfahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſfi Leeli·Kungi ta
Kehnixa no Babeles eegahje eek-
scha / un turrejahs pee tahm
widdejahm Wahrtim / prohti
NergalSarEezers / Samgar
Nebo / Sar Sekims to Kam-
har Junkurn Wirfneeks/ Nergal
Sar Eezers ta Lehgera Wirf-
neeks/ un wiſfi zitti Leel·Kungi
ta Kehnixa no Babeles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas notitkahs/ kad Ze-
dektius tas Kehnisch no Juḥ-
da/ un wiſfi Kerra·Wihri tohs
redſeja/ tad behoſe tee/ un iſgah-
je Nafti no ta Pilsfahta ahra
us to Zettu pee Kehnixa Dahr-
sa/ zaur tahm Wahrtim starp
teem Diweem Muhrreem/ un
wiſch gahje zaur to Klatjuma
Zettu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet to Kaldeeën Spehks
dsinnahs winneem vakkāt / un
panahze Zedektiju eekſch Jerikus
Klatjunneem/ un fanehme to/ un
wedde to augſcham pee Nebu-
kadNezara ta Kehnixa no Ba-
beles uhs Riblatu/ eekſch Eema-
ta Seimnes/ un tas noneſte pahr
winnu to Teefu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch no Ba-
beles nokawe tohs Behrnus Ze-
dektius eekſch Riblatas preefsch
winna Azziim / ir wiſtus Zeent-
gus
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
